allow: Bash(python3 -c "from pdflib.models import FileFormat; f = FileFormat\(format=''pdf'', path=''Go/test.pdf'', original_filename=''test.pdf'', gdrive_url=''https://drive.google.com/test''\); print\(f\); d = {''format'': ''pdf'', ''path'': ''Go/test.pdf'', ''original_filename'': ''test.pdf'', ''gdrive_url'': ''https://example.com''}; f2 = FileFormat\(format=d[''format''], path=d[''path''], original_filename=d[''original_filename''], gdrive_url=d.get\(''gdrive_url''\)\); print\(f2.gdrive_url\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\); from pdflib.models import FileFormat; f = FileFormat\(format=''pdf'', path=''Go/test.pdf'', original_filename=''test.pdf'', gdrive_url=''https://drive.google.com/test''\); print\(''gdrive_url:'', f.gdrive_url\)")
